policies.name: fam-basic-deploy-monitoring
policies.description: Monitors demo app containers in the payments namespace for changes to /etc/passwd. Scoped to payments so openshift-debug pods from oc debug node do not match.
policies.rationale: Modifications to system files like /etc/passwd inside application containers can indicate image tampering or misconfiguration. Scoping to the demo namespace avoids false positives from debug tooling.
policies.remediation: Review the affected deployment and container image for unauthorized or unexpected changes to system files. Rebuild the image from a trusted source if necessary, and investigate any deployment pipelines or automation that could have introduced the modification.
